title: elatostema cochinchinense
intro: Elatostema cochinchinense is a type of plant species in the Urticaceae family, commonly known as the Vietnamese coriander or Cambodian coriander. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Elatostema cochinchinense include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, prevent infections, and protect against cell damage. Elatostema cochinchinense is typically consumed as a herbal preparation, such as a tea or tincture, and is also used in cooking as a fragrant herb, offering health benefits like digestive support and immune system boost.
